title: Uruguayan Beef Roast
description: A traditional Uruguayan-style roasted beef dish, served with a rich and savory flavor. Perfect for special occasions.

ingredients.name: Beef Roast
ingredients.notes: Chuck or rib roast works well

instructions: Season the beef roast with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef roast on all sides until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven.
Roast the beef in the oven for 2-3 hours, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135°F (57°C) for medium-rare.
Let the beef rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
Serve with a sprinkle of fresh thyme and garlic on top.
